parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT espo_user_id FROM public.slack_user_map WHERE slack_user_id = $1 LIMIT 1) AS espo_user_id;
INSERT INTO public.task_notify_audit (task_id, espo_user_id, slack_user_id, event, payload) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'acknowledged', $4::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Verify Signature & Parse').first().json.taskId, ($('Map Slack→Espo User').first().json ? ($('Map Slack→Espo User').first().json.espo_user_id || '') : ''), $('Verify Signature & Parse').first().json.slackUserId, JSON.stringify($('Verify Signature & Parse').first().json) ] }}
